description_long: This is a robust, rectangular toolbox with a hard, dark gray and black exterior, designed for durability and secure storage. The top features a prominent, integrated handle for easy carrying, and the sides display reinforced edges and corners for impact resistance. On the front face, there are two green-accented latches and a radiation warning symbol, suggesting it may be used for hazardous or sensitive materials. The rear side has a textured, reinforced panel and a central green grip, flanked by two vertical blue-lit elements, possibly indicating locking or status indicators. The surface finish is matte with subtle texturing, and the overall construction appears to be heavy-duty plastic or composite with metal reinforcements. The box is compact, portable, and designed to be both secure and easy to transport in urban environments.
description: A rugged, dark gray and black toolbox with reinforced corners, a central handle, green-accented latches, and a radiation warning symbol on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main handle, two green latches, and a radiation warning symbol.
description_view_1: Rear view with a green grip, two vertical blue-lit elements, and reinforced paneling.
description_view_2: Identical to front view, showing handle, green latches, and radiation warning symbol.
description_view_3: Identical to rear view, with green grip and blue-lit elements.
attribute_handle_type: Single integrated folding handle on top, made of hard plastic with ergonomic grip features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing plastic and metal clasp latches with green accents; no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A radiation warning symbol is present on the front panel, centered; no brand name or text visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Internal compartment configuration not visible; exterior suggests a single large internal compartment with a hinged lid.
attribute_external_labeling: Radiation warning symbol on front panel
